name: TenneT Qualification System for Protection and Control Systems.
requirements: REQ-001 [HIGH*] Provision of Protection Systems: The qualified entity must be capable of providing protection systems for power transmission networks.
REQ-002 [HIGH*] Provision of Control Systems: The qualified entity must be capable of providing control systems for power transmission networks.

REQ-003 [HIGH*] Integration of Protection and Control Systems: The qualified entity must demonstrate expertise in integrating protection and control solutions within large-scale power transmission networks.

REQ-004 [HIGH*] Compliance with Power Grid Standards: The provided systems and services must comply with relevant national (German) and international standards for power grid operations and equipment.

REQ-005 [HIGH*] Engineering Expertise in Power Transmission Networks: The bidding entity must possess deep engineering expertise in designing, implementing, and integrating solutions for large-scale power transmission networks.

REQ-006 [HIGH*] Experience with Mission-Critical Industrial Infrastructure: The qualified entity should have a proven track record in delivering solutions for mission-critical industrial infrastructure.
clarificationQuestion: Underestimating the effort required for the qualification process itself, separate from actual project delivery.

matchCandidates.name: Georg Müller
matchCandidates.reason: Georg possesses extensive project management experience, including direct past experience in the 'Energy' sector, which is highly relevant for power transmission networks and mission-critical infrastructure, and is available.

matchCandidates.name: Bob Johnson
matchCandidates.reason: Bob's expertise in 'System Design' and experience in 'Manufacturing' and 'Logistics' align well with the need for integrating complex, mission-critical industrial infrastructure, and he is available.

matchCandidates.name: Markus Hoffmann
matchCandidates.reason: Markus has strong engineering expertise in 'Electrification' and 'Automation' with relevant skills like 'MATLAB/Simulink' for control systems, but his availability is too far in the future for this project.

matchCandidates.name: Ethan Hunt
matchCandidates.reason: Ethan's experience in 'Telecommunications' and DevOps skills are relevant for mission-critical infrastructure, but he is currently on another project and unavailable.

matchCandidates.name: Fiona Gallagher
matchCandidates.reason: Fiona's backend development skills could be tangentially useful for integration layers, but her industry experience is not directly aligned with power transmission networks.

matchCandidates.reason: Alice's frontend development role and industry experience are not directly relevant to the core requirements of protection and control systems for power transmission networks.

matchCandidates.reason: Charlie's full stack role and industry experience are not relevant to the project, and he is currently on another project.

matchCandidates.reason: Diana's UI/UX design role and industry experience are not relevant to the core requirements of protection and control systems for power transmission networks.

name: 9d2f2062-accd-49b8-bcf5-c57caab2f612.pdf
requirements: REQ-001 [HIGH*] Inventory of Existing Switchgear: Conduct a comprehensive inventory of all existing switchgear at the Jülich wastewater treatment plant.
REQ-002 [HIGH*] Creation of Measurement Point and Drive List: Develop a detailed list of all measurement points and drives within the existing switchgear infrastructure.

REQ-003 [HIGH*] Renewal Planning for Low-Voltage Distribution Systems: Plan the renewal of the following low-voltage distribution systems (Niederspannungsverteilungen - NSV): NSV Rechen und Zulauf, NSV Vorklärung, NSV BioP, NSV Schlammbehandlung, NSV Biologie, NSV Nachklärung und Filtration.

REQ-004 [HIGH*] Renewal Planning for Sub-Distribution Boards and Control Cabinets: Plan the renewal of sub-distribution boards and control cabinets, specifically for the Sandwäscher and Sandfang, and five general building services cabinets (Haustechnikschränke).
REQ-005 [HIGH*] Renewal Planning for Automation Technology: Plan the renewal of the overall automation technology, including adaptation of the existing process control system.
REQ-006 [HIGH*] Renewal Planning for Main PLC in NSHV: Plan the renewal of the main PLC (Kopf SPS) located in the main low-voltage switchgear (NSHV).
REQ-007 [HIGH*] Partial Renewal of Cable System and Cable Routes: Plan the partial renewal of the cable system and expansion of cable routes.
REQ-008 [HIGH*] Operating Cost and Energy Consumption Analysis: During the planning phase, analyze the impact of the renewal measures on operating costs, demand, and electricity consumption.

REQ-009 [HIGH*] Compliance with TVgG NRW: The contractor must comply with the principles set forth in the Tariftreue- und Vergabegesetz NRW (§ 2 Abs. 1-4 TVgG NRW) and guarantee compliance by all subcontractors. The client reserves the right to audit compliance and impose contractual penalties or extraordinary termination for violations.

REQ-010 [HIGH*] Exclusion Criteria Compliance: Bidders must not have committed severe offenses such as criminal association, terrorism, money laundering, fraud, bribery, human trafficking, tax/social security payment violations, environmental/social/labor law violations, insolvency, severe misconduct, anti-competitive agreements, conflicts of interest, distortion of competition due to prior involvement, deficient performance of previous public contracts, or deception in procurement procedures.

REQ-011 [HIGH*] Electronic Communication Requirement: All communication between the client and bidders, from announcement to award, must be exclusively electronic via the procurement platform of the Aachen economic region.
REQ-012 [HIGH*] Electronic Submission of Bids: Electronic submission of bids is required.
REQ-013 [HIGH*] German Language Requirement: The binding language for procurement documents and bid submissions is German.
REQ-014 [HIGH*] Electronic Invoicing and Payments: Electronic invoicing is required, and payments will be made electronically.
clarificationQuestion: Failure to adhere to the strict electronic communication and submission protocols will lead to disqualification.

name: 9d2f2062-accd-49b8-bcf5-c57caab2f612.pdf
requirements: REQ-001 [HIGH*] Inventory of Existing Switchgear: Conduct a comprehensive inventory of all existing switchgear at the Jülich wastewater treatment plant.
REQ-002 [HIGH*] Creation of Measurement Point and Drive List: Develop a detailed list of all measurement points and drives within the existing switchgear and automation systems.

REQ-003 [HIGH*] Renewal of Low-Voltage Distribution Systems (NSV): Plan the renewal of the following low-voltage distribution systems: NSV Rechen und Zulauf, NSV Vorklärung, NSV BioP, NSV Schlammbehandlung, NSV Biologie, NSV Nachklärung und Filtration.

REQ-004 [HIGH*] Renewal of Sub-Distribution Boards and Control Cabinets: Plan the renewal of sub-distribution boards and control cabinets, specifically for the Sandwäscher and Sandfang, and five general building services cabinets.
REQ-005 [HIGH*] Renewal of Automation Technology: Plan the renewal of the overall automation technology, including adaptation of the existing process control system.
REQ-006 [HIGH*] Renewal of Main PLC in NSHV: Plan the renewal of the main PLC located in the Niederspannungshauptverteilung (NSHV - Low-Voltage Main Distribution Board).
REQ-007 [HIGH*] Partial Renewal of Cable System and Cable Routes: Plan the partial renewal of the cable infrastructure and expansion of cable routes.

REQ-008 [HIGH*] Operating Cost, Demand, and Electricity Consumption Analysis: During the planning phase, analyze the impact of the renewal measures on operating costs, demand, and electricity consumption.

REQ-009 [HIGH*] Compliance with TVgG NRW: The contractor must comply with the principles set forth in the Tariftreue- und Vergabegesetz NRW (§ 2 Abs. 1 to 4 TVgG NRW). This includes ensuring compliance by all subcontractors.

REQ-010 [HIGH*] Electronic Communication Requirement: All communication between the Central Procurement Office and bidders, from announcement to award, must be exclusively electronic via the procurement platform of the Aachen economic region.
REQ-011 [HIGH*] Electronic Submission of Tenders: Tenders and participation requests must be submitted electronically.
REQ-012 [HIGH*] Language of Submission: Offers or participation requests must be submitted in German.
REQ-013 [HIGH*] Electronic Invoicing and Payments: Electronic invoicing is required, and payments will be made electronically.

REQ-014 [HIGH*] Exclusion Criteria Compliance: Bidders must not be subject to any national exclusion grounds, including criminal association, terrorism financing, fraud, bribery, human trafficking, tax/social security payment defaults, environmental/social/labor law violations, insolvency, severe misconduct, anti-competitive agreements, conflicts of interest, or poor past performance.

REQ-015 [HIGH*] Personnel Qualifications Documentation: Provide relevant educational and professional qualifications of the personnel to be deployed for contract execution, using the provided template 'Tabelle 2026-03-25_Vorlage Personal'.
clarificationQuestion: Underestimating the complexity and breadth of the electrical and automation planning required for a wastewater treatment plant, especially with multiple distribution systems and process control integration.

name: 9d2f2062-accd-49b8-bcf5-c57caab2f612.pdf
requirements: REQ-001 [HIGH*] Inventory of Existing Switchgear: Conduct a comprehensive inventory of all existing switchgear at the Jülich wastewater treatment plant.
REQ-002 [HIGH*] Creation of Measurement Point and Drive List: Develop a detailed list of all measurement points and drives within the existing switchgear infrastructure.

REQ-003 [HIGH*] Renewal of Low-Voltage Distribution Systems (NSV): Plan the renewal of the following low-voltage distribution systems: NSV Rechen und Zulauf, NSV Vorklärung, NSV BioP, NSV Schlammbehandlung, NSV Biologie, NSV Nachklärung und Filtration.

REQ-004 [HIGH*] Renewal of Sub-Distribution Boards and Control Cabinets: Plan the renewal of sub-distribution boards and control cabinets for the Sandwäscher and Sandfang, and five general building services cabinets.
REQ-005 [HIGH*] Renewal of Automation Technology: Plan the renewal of the overall automation technology for the plant.
REQ-006 [HIGH*] Adaptation of Process Control System: Plan the necessary adaptations to the existing process control system to integrate the new automation technology.
REQ-007 [HIGH*] Renewal of Main PLC in NSHV: Plan the renewal of the main PLC (Kopf SPS) located in the main low-voltage switchgear (NSHV).
REQ-008 [HIGH*] Partial Renewal of Cable System and Cable Routes: Plan the partial renewal of the cable system and the expansion of cable routes.

REQ-009 [HIGH*] Operating Cost Analysis: During the planning phase, analyze the contribution development through the renewal measures, specifically focusing on operating cost determination, demand assessment, and electricity consumption.

REQ-010 [HIGH*] Compliance with TVgG NRW: The contractor must comply with the principles set out in the Tariftreue- und Vergabegesetz NRW (§ 2 Abs. 1-4 TVgG NRW) and guarantee compliance by all subcontractors. The client reserves the right to control, audit, and terminate the contract with penalties for non-compliance.

REQ-011 [HIGH*] Exclusion Criteria Compliance: Bidders must not have any grounds for exclusion as listed, including criminal offenses (e.g., criminal organizations, terrorism, money laundering, fraud, bribery, human trafficking), violations of tax or social security obligations, environmental or labor law violations, insolvency, severe misconduct, anti-competitive agreements, conflicts of interest, distortion of competition due to prior involvement, or deficient performance of previous public contracts.

REQ-012 [HIGH*] Professional Liability Insurance: Maintain a valid professional liability insurance with a minimum coverage of 3.0 million EUR per claim, covering at least two claims per year, for personal injury, property damage, and financial losses throughout the contract duration. Proof of insurance must be provided upon request and must cover activities performed by subcontractors.
REQ-013 [HIGH*] Tax and Social Security Contribution Proof: Provide proof that taxes, duties, and social security contributions have been paid. This proof should not be older than one year.

REQ-014 [HIGH*] No Severe Misconduct or Supply Chain Act Violations: Declare that no severe misconduct according to §§ 123, 124 GWB has been committed that questions the reliability of the applicant, and that no grounds for exclusion according to § 22 LkSG (Lieferkettensorgfaltspflichtengesetz) exist.

REQ-015 [HIGH*] Electronic Communication and Submission: All communication, inquiries, and submissions (including applications and offers) must be exclusively electronic via the procurement platform of the Wirtschaftsregion Aachen.
REQ-016 [HIGH*] Electronic Invoicing and Payments: Electronic invoicing is required, and payments will be made electronically.
clarificationQuestion: Failure to strictly adhere to the electronic communication and submission protocols via the specified platform.
